title: Senior Financial Analyst - Manappuram Finance - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Manappuram Finance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Manappuram Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Manappuram Finance:
Manappuram Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manappuram Finance!
